title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_manager.py (第 330 至 410 行，共 466 行) ---
 330 | 
 331 |         working_max = max(self.working_memory.max_size, 1)
 332 |         episodic_max = max(self.episodic_memory.max_size, 1)
 333 |         return {
 334 |             "enabled": True,
 335 |             "working_memory": {
 336 |                 "size": len(self.working_memory),
 337 |                 "max_size": self.working_memory.max_size,
 338 |                 "usage_rate": len(self.working_memory) / working_max,
 339 |             },
 340 |             "episodic_memory": {
 341 |                 "size": len(self.episodic_memory),
 342 |                 "max_size": self.episodic_memory.max_size,
 343 |                 "usage_rate": len(self.episodic_memory) / episodic_max,
 344 |             },
 345 |             "long_term_memory": {
 346 |                 "count": len(self.long_term_memory),
 347 |                 "summary_count": len(self.long_term_memory.index),
 348 |                 "item_count": len(self.long_term_memory.item_index),
 349 |                 "storage_dir": str(self.long_term_memory.storage_dir),
 350 |             },
 351 |         }
 352 | 
 353 |     def export_memories(
 354 |         self,
 355 |         session_summaries: Optional[List[SessionSummary]] = None,
 356 |         history_summary: str = "",
 357 |         include_memory_items: bool = False,
 358 |     ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 359 |         """
 360 |         导出可写入 session 文件的会话局部记忆数据。
 361 | 
 362 |         注意：长期 MemoryItem 已持久化在 memory/long_term 目录，并由 index.json 管理。
 363 |         默认不再把所有长期 MemoryItem 嵌入每个 session JSON，否则会导致：
 364 |         1. session 文件随长期记忆规模线性膨胀；
 365 |         2. 启动恢复 session 时重复 store_item 写回几百/几千条长期记忆；
 366 |         3. Windows 下反复写 index.json，显著拖慢启动。
 367 |         """
 368 |         session_summaries = session_summaries or []
 369 |         memory_items = []
 370 |         if include_memory_items and self.enabled:
 371 |             memory_items = [item.to_dict() for item in self.long_term_memory.get_all_items()]
 372 | 
 373 |         if not self.enabled:
 374 |             return {
 375 |                 "working_memory": [],
 376 |                 "episodic_memory": [],
 377 |                 "memory_items": memory_items,
 378 |                 "session_summaries": [s.to_dict() for s in session_summaries],
 379 |                 "history_summary": history_summary,
 380 |             }
 381 | 
 382 |         return {
 383 |             "working_memory": self.working_memory.get_all(),
 384 |             "episodic_memory": [s.to_dict() for s in self.episodic_memory.get_all()],
 385 |             "memory_items": memory_items,
 386 |             "session_summaries": [s.to_dict() for s in session_summaries],
 387 |             "history_summary": history_summary,
 388 |         }
 389 | 
 390 |     def import_memories(self, data: Dict[str, Any], import_memory_items: bool = False) -> Dict[str, Any]:
 391 |         """
 392 |         导入 session 文件中的会话局部记忆数据。
 393 | 
 394 |         返回 Phase 1 兼容字段：history_summary 与 session_summaries。
 395 |         默认跳过旧 session 内嵌的 memory_items，因为这些长期记忆已经在
 396 |         memory/long_term/index.json 中加载；再次导入会造成启动期大量重复写盘。
 397 |         """
 398 |         session_summaries: List[SessionSummary] = []
 399 |         for s_dict in data.get("session_summaries", []):
 400 |             try:
 401 |                 session_summaries.append(SessionSummary.from_dict(s_dict))
 402 |             except Exception as e:
 403 |                 print(f"⚠️ 恢复会话摘要失败: {e}")
 404 | 
 405 |         if self.enabled:
 406 |             self.working_memory.clear()
 407 |             for msg in data.get("working_memory", []):
 408 |                 self.working_memory.add(msg)
 409 | 
 410 |             self.episodic_memory.clear()
--- 读取完毕 ---
